english_name: Heroine Make Long & Curl Mascara Advanced Film
japanese_name: ヒロインメイク ロング＆カールマスカラ アドバンストフィルム
description: Heroine Make Long & Curl Mascara. Japan's drama-proof mascara for curled lashes that hold through humidity, tears, and 2 a.m. bad decisions.

english_name: Heroine Make Long UP Mascara Super WP N
japanese_name: ヒロインメイク ロングUPマスカラ スーパーWP N
description: Heroine Make Long UP Mascara. Fiber-heavy, waterproof, and stubborn in the best way. Buy the remover too or accept your fate.
notes: [AMBIGUOUS: Long UP Mascara Super WP N; Long & Curl Mascara Advanced Film]

japanese_name: ハイチュウ
description: Hi-Chew. Fruity chewy candy with a weirdly serious cult following. The konbini checkout add-on that becomes five sticks gone.

japanese_name: 手ピカジェル
description: Tepika Gel. Pocket hand sanitizer, high-alcohol, drugstore-standard. Train strap touched, hands handled.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Hibiscrub, Tepika Gel, pharmacy hand sanitizer sprays, pharmacy alcohol gels] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: サントリー 角ハイボール缶
description: Suntory Kakubin Highball can. Whisky soda in a can, crisp and dangerous-in-a-convenient-way. The konbini answer to 'one more before the hotel.'

japanese_name: ひのきまな板
description: Hinoki cutting board. Soft Japanese cypress that is gentle on knives and smells faintly fancy when wet. A kitchen souvenir for people who own one good knife.

japanese_name: もみじ饅頭
description: Momiji manju. Hiroshima maple-leaf cake with red bean paste inside. Station-gift energy, but actually worth eating warm.

japanese_name: ヒヤロン
description: Hiyaron cold pack. Squeeze-to-chill emergency ice pack. Summer Japan turns into soup; this is pocket air-conditioning for bruises and heat.

japanese_name: ひよ子
description: Hiyoko bird cakes. Chick-shaped manju with sweet bean filling. Cute enough to forgive the suitcase crumbs.

japanese_name: ほぼ日手帳
description: Hobonichi Techo. Daily planner with cult stationery energy. For people who say 'I just need one notebook' and leave Loft with a lifestyle.

japanese_name: ほぼ日手帳 Planner
description: Hobonichi Techo Planner. The English-layout Hobonichi daily planner. Tiny grid, quotes, paper nerd happiness.
notes: [POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE_OF: Hobonichi Techo] No reliable image source found

english_name: Oi Ocha Hojicha Roasted Green Tea
japanese_name: お〜いお茶 ほうじ茶
description: Oi Ocha Hojicha. Roasted green tea, unsweetened and toasty. The bottle to grab when matcha feels too loud.

japanese_name: お〜いお茶 ほうじ茶 ティーバッグ
description: Oi Ocha Hojicha Tea Bags. Roasted green tea at home without the cafe markup. Toasty, low-drama, good after dinner.

japanese_name: 花畑牧場 生キャラメル
description: Hanabatake Bokujo Fresh Caramel. Hokkaido milk caramel that melts fast. Airport souvenir behavior, but in tiny rich squares.

english_name: LeTAO Otaru Rue Ironai Fromage Milk
japanese_name: 小樽色内通りフロマージュ ミルク
description: LeTAO Otaru Rue Ironai Fromage Milk. Crispy cheese cookie with mascarpone cream energy. The suitcase snack that feels too fragile for your self-control.

japanese_name: ルタオ ドゥーブルフロマージュ
description: LeTAO Double Fromage. Two-layer Hokkaido cheesecake, half baked, half mousse. Buy cold, carry carefully, eat like plans never existed.

japanese_name: 大型クレーンゲームぬいぐるみ
description: Large claw-machine plush. Jumbo arcade prize plush, usually cute and financially rude. The real price is whatever the machine decides your confidence is worth.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Sanrio jumbo plush, Pokemon plush, Kirby plush, anime character plush] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: 一番くじ 大型フィギュア賞
description: Ichiban Kuji large figure prize. Lottery-only anime figure prize, usually the letter you actually want. Buy tickets, pray to Bandai, accept merch chaos.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: One Piece figure prize, Dragon Ball figure prize, Demon Slayer figure prize, My Hero Academia figure prize] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: 印傳屋 革小物
description: Inden leather goods. Lacquered deerskin wallets and pouches from Yamanashi. Traditional craft that does not scream souvenir.

japanese_name: 藍染め体験
description: Aizome indigo dyeing workshop. Dye a handkerchief, scarf, or tote in deep Japanese blue. Hands blue, souvenir earned.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: Tokushima aizome workshop, Tokyo aizome scarf workshop, indigo handkerchief dyeing, indigo tote dyeing] No reliable image source found

english_name: Amano Foods Freeze-Dried Miso Soup Variety Pack
japanese_name: アマノフーズ フリーズドライ味噌汁 バラエティセット
description: Amano Foods instant miso soup variety pack. Freeze-dried miso soup that wakes up with hot water. Hotel-room dinner upgrade when FamilyMart has defeated you.

japanese_name: システマ 歯間用ブラシ
description: Systema interdental brushes. Tiny tooth-gap cleaners in sizes that get very personal. Drugstore buy after Japan convinces you oral care is an Olympic sport.

japanese_name: 伊東屋 Note Couture カスタムノート
description: Itoya Note Couture notebook. Custom notebook from Tokyo stationery heaven. Choose paper, cover, binding, then pretend this was a practical purchase.
notes: [CATEGORY_INPUT: custom notebook, paper goods, covers, notebook refills] No reliable image source found

japanese_name: イワコー おもしろ消しゴム
description: Iwako Puzzle Erasers. Tiny food and animal erasers that come apart like toys. Technically stationery; emotionally gacha bait.

english_name: Iwatani Aburiya II Portable Gas Grill
japanese_name: イワタニ 炉ばた焼器 炙りやII
description: Iwatani Aburiya II. Tabletop butane grill for yakitori and yakiniku. Apartment BBQ energy without committing to charcoal.
